mapper.sql: id, motherboard_user_id, cloud_account_id, status, bill_date, period_start_date, period_end_date, item_count, unknown_item_count, total_pretax_amount, unknown_pretax_amount, message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM billing_audit_run WHERE id = #{id} AND motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId}
SELECT FROM billing_audit_run WHERE motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO billing_audit_run ( motherboard_user_id, cloud_account_id, status, bill_date, period_start_date, period_end_date, item_count, unknown_item_count, total_pretax_amount, unknown_pretax_amount, message, started_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{motherboardUserId}, #{cloudAccountId}, #{status}, #{billDate}, #{periodStartDate}, #{periodEndDate}, #{itemCount}, #{unknownItemCount}, #{totalPretaxAmount}, #{unknownPretaxAmount}, #{message}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_audit_run SET cloud_account_id = #{cloudAccountId}, status = #{status}, bill_date = #{billDate}, period_start_date = #{periodStartDate}, period_end_date = #{periodEndDate}, item_count = #{itemCount}, unknown_item_count = #{unknownItemCount}, total_pretax_amount = #{totalPretaxAmount}, unknown_pretax_amount = #{unknownPretaxAmount}, message = #{message}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM billing_audit_run WHERE id = #{id} AND motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId}
